title: Inventory Pause (Cursed)
description: Pause your single player game when you open your inventory.
body:
# Inventory Pause (Legacy Fabric Cursed Edition) --- ## Pause your single player game when you open your inventory.
Forge GitHub Modrinth CurseForge
Fabric (by umollu) GitHub Modrinth CurseForge
Fabric Legacy GitHub Modrinth
![](https://media.giphy.com/media/mCJQCNkacCMGpUDj3h/giphy.gif) This is a port of [umollu's inventory-pause mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-pause) to fabric-cursed-legacy and fabric-legacy. It supports pausing on opening the inventory, opening furnaces, crafting tables and other vanilla screens. This mod is __client-side only__ and won't be active in LAN worlds or on servers. ## [Releases](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-pause-cursed/versions) The mod is licensed under the [MIT License](LICENSE.md) ## Dependencies As of v0.8 it is completely dependency-free! ~~The b1.7.3 version of this mod depends on [Cursed Legacy API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cursed-legacy-api)~~
